top_signals.title: AI Bubble Is Coming to Credit Markets, DoubleLine’s Cohen Says
top_signals.summary: Artificial intelligence debt will almost certainly reach bubble levels eventually, given the history of periods of heavy investments in areas like railroads and the internet, said DoubleLine portfolio manager Robert Cohen.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: What Is Jeffrey Rosenberg Reading This Summer
top_signals.summary: Jeffrey Rosenberg, BlackRock Portfolio Manager of the iShares Systematic Alternatives Active ETF, talks about the books he is reading this summer. He speaks to Tom Keene and Scarlet Fu in New York on June 2 at a Bloomberg subscribers only event for the launch of Bloomberg Money. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Failed Simba-M1 deal sends Singapore telecom consolidation to square one
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Perplexity CEO tells CNBC one metric will determine who wins the AI race
top_signals.summary: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas said that whichever company can provide the "most taken value per watt per user" will be the AI winners in the future.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Venezuela mining reset meets ground-level challenges
top_signals.summary: Venezuela’s attempt to revive its mining sector after Nicolás Maduro’s ouster is colliding with decades of institutional decay, illegal extraction and investor skepticism.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
